import os
import json

os.makedirs("test_data", exist_ok=True)
with open("test_data/eval_config.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump({
        "test_period": ["2021-01-01", "2021-01-31"],
        "universe": "csi300"
    }, f)

print("Running local predict.py...")
os.system("python predict.py --data_path test_data --checkpoint checkpoints --output test_output.json")
if os.path.exists("test_output.json"):
    with open("test_output.json", "r") as f:
        res = json.load(f)
        print("Local test IC Mean:", res.get("ic_mean"))
else:
    print("test_output.json not found!")
